item.title: Conditional Risk-On, AI Discipline, and HK Flow Risk
item.description:
Oil and yields eased enough to broaden risk appetite, but Broadcom's selloff, AI-linked layoffs, and Hong Kong financial-share pressure kept the rally conditional.
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-05-conditional-risk-on-ai-hk-flows.md
item.content:encoded:
Oil and yields eased enough to broaden risk appetite, but Broadcom's selloff, AI-linked layoffs, and Hong Kong financial-share pressure kept the rally conditional.
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-05-conditional-risk-on-ai-hk-flows.md
item.itunes:summary: Oil and yields eased enough to broaden risk appetite, but Broadcom's selloff, AI-linked layoffs, and Hong Kong financial-share pressure kept the rally conditional.
item.itunes:keywords: risk-on, Broadcom, AI capex, labor market, Hong Kong financials, capital controls

item.title: Sample Briefing: Oil, Rates, and AI Capex
item.description:
A short formal Morning News sample episode for Apple Podcasts follow testing.

item.itunes:keywords: rates, oil, AI capex, SpaceX, China services
